{"code":"(def open-prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "open"}))
[(count open-prs)
 (->> open-prs
      (group-by :repo)
      (map (fn [[repo prs]] [repo (count prs)]))
      (sort-by second >)
      first)]"}
